CGAL::Boolean_property_map.name: CGAL::Boolean_property_map
CGAL::Boolean_property_map.brief: Read-write property map turning a set (such a std::set , boost::unordered_set , std::unordered_set ) into a property map associating a Boolean to the value type of the set.
CGAL::Boolean_property_map.detailed: The function get will return true if the key is inside the set and false otherwise. The put function will insert an element in the set if true is passed and erase it otherwise. Is model of ReadWritePropertyMap

members.name: Boolean_property_map
members.brief: Constructor taking a copy of the set.
members.detailed: Note that set_ must be valid while the property map is in use.

members.name: put
members.argsstring: (Boolean_property_map< Set > pm, const key_type &k, bool v)

CGAL::Cartesian_converter_property_map.name: CGAL::Cartesian_converter_property_map
CGAL::Cartesian_converter_property_map.brief: Read-write property map doing on-the-fly conversions between two default constructible CGAL Cartesian kernels.
CGAL::Cartesian_converter_property_map.detailed: Its value type is GeomObject and its key type is the same as Vpm . GeomObject must be a geometric object from a CGAL kernel. Vpm is a model of ReadWritePropertyMap and its value type must be a geometric object of the same type as GeomObject but possibly from another kernel. Conversions between the two geometric objects are done using Cartesian_converter . Is model of ReadWritePropertyMap

members.name: put
members.argsstring: (Cartesian_converter_property_map< GeomObject, Vpm > &pm, const key_type &k, const value_type &v)

CGAL::Compose_property_map.name: CGAL::Compose_property_map
CGAL::Compose_property_map.brief: Property map that composes two property maps, that is a call on an instance Compose_property_map compose_property_map(key_map, value_map) of get(compose_property_map, k) returns get(value_map, get(key_map, k)) .

members.brief: < Use the key type of KeyMap as keytype
members.detailed: Use the value type of ValueMap as value type

members.name: value_type
members.brief: Use the reference type of ValueMap as reference.

members.name: reference
members.brief: Use the category of the ValueMap .

CGAL::Constant_property_map.name: CGAL::Constant_property_map
CGAL::Constant_property_map.brief: Property map that returns a fixed value.
CGAL::Constant_property_map.detailed: Note that this value is chosen when the map is constructed and cannot be changed afterwards. Specifically, the free function put() does nothing. Is model of ReadWritePropertyMap

members.definition: typedef const value_type& CGAL::Constant_property_map< KeyType, ValueType >::reference

CGAL::Dereference_property_map.name: CGAL::Dereference_property_map
CGAL::Dereference_property_map.brief: Property map that converts a T* pointer (or in general an iterator over T elements) to the T object.

CGAL::First_of_pair_property_map.name: CGAL::First_of_pair_property_map
CGAL::First_of_pair_property_map.brief: Property map that accesses the first item of a std::pair .
CGAL::First_of_pair_property_map.detailed: Pair Instance of std::pair . Is model of LvaluePropertyMap CGAL::Second_of_pair_property_map <Pair>

members.detailed: pair a key whose first item is accessed

CGAL::Identity_property_map.name: CGAL::Identity_property_map
CGAL::Identity_property_map.brief: A LvaluePropertyMap property map mapping a key to itself (by reference).
CGAL::Identity_property_map.detailed: It is mutable if T is not const and non-mutable otherwise. Is model of LvaluePropertyMap

CGAL::Nth_of_tuple_property_map.detailed: N Index of the item to access. Tuple Instance of boost::tuple or std::tuple . Is model of LvaluePropertyMap

CGAL::Random_access_property_map.name: CGAL::Random_access_property_map
CGAL::Random_access_property_map.brief: A property map with std::size_t as key-type that can be used to access the i-th element in a container with random access.
CGAL::Random_access_property_map.detailed: Is model of LvaluePropertyMap constness being than of Container .

PkgPropertyMapRef.name: PkgPropertyMapRef
PkgPropertyMapRef.detailed: Andreas Fabri and Laurent Saboret This package provides a framework for interfacing CGAL data structures with algorithms expecting Boost Property Maps. Introduced in: CGAL 3.5 BibTeX: cgal:fs-cbpm-26a License: LGPL

members.name: make_property_map
members.brief: Starting from boost 1.55, the use of raw pointers as property maps has been deprecated.
members.detailed: This function is a shortcut to the recommended replacement: boost::make_iterator_property_map(<pointer>, boost::typed_identity_property_map<std::size_t>()) Note that the property map is a mutable LvaluePropertyMap with std::size_t as key.

members.name: make_property_map
members.brief: equivalent to make_property_map (&v[0]) Note that v must not be modified while using the property map created
